color: rgb(136, 19, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
SETUP FIRST
Separate the offline, target-Mac,
and release-candidate test environments

div.style: color: rgb(136, 19, 55) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EPIC 1
Fix the mas source of truth

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PARALLEL WAVE 1
Start all three after Epic 1

div.style: color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(30, 58, 138) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(6, 78, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PARALLEL WAVE 2
Start both as soon as Epic 4 finishes

div.style: color: rgb(6, 78, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EPIC 5
Processes, locks, output,
cancellation, and timeouts

div.style: color: rgb(6, 78, 59) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EPIC 6
Crash, relaunch, persistence,
and diagnostics

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
WAIT HERE
Epics 2, 3, 5, and 6 must all finish

div.style: color: rgb(120, 53, 15) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RUN IN PARALLEL FROM DAY ONE
Approve the coverage map
Decide minimum macOS (DR-1)
Decide gate/retry policy (DR-4)
Build the evidence system (ASR-04)
Prepare Macs, prior app, credentials,
storage, assignees, and dates

div.style: color: rgb(124, 45, 18) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RELEASE PREPARATION
Freeze one signed, notarized candidate
This is a gate, not Epic 9

div.style: color: rgb(76, 29, 149) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EPIC 7
Packaged accessibility and updater
on Apple silicon and physical Intel

div.style: color: rgb(76, 29, 149) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
EPIC 8
Signing, artifacts, reproducibility,
and the final evidence ledger

div.style: color: rgb(15, 23, 42) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
READY FOR THE LATER
TRACE / READINESS DECISION

svg.text: Pack-Manager P0 Readiness — What Can Run Together?
